content: Open source GitHub remote was created as public repo jeanpfs/bd-board, origin uses HTTPS, and main tracks origin/main.
Upstream PR opened at https://github.com/gastownhall/beads/pull/4349 to list bd-board in docs/COMMUNITY_TOOLS.md under Web UIs.

Updated pnpm/action-setup from v4 to v6 because v4 action.yml declares runs.using node20 while v6 declares node24; this directly removes the deprecated Node 20 action runtime without adding workflow flags.
